title: Morning Will Break

sections.label: Intro
lines: Out of the depths, I call to You,
My soul aches, raw, through the silence and hue.
I watch the dawn, a faint, distant flame,
Waiting on mercy, calling Your name.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: If You held all my faults in Your sight,
Who could stand in the shadow of Your light?
But You, O Lord, forgive and restore,
I find my strength in You evermore.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I will wait for the morning, the promise unseen,
Like watchmen in darkness, for the day to redeem.
With steadfast hope, my soul will rise,
Your love unfailing, my endless skies.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Israel, trust in the depths of His grace,
His redemption flows, an endless embrace.
He will ransom, renew every tear,
Bringing hope to the broken, drawing us near.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, in the waiting, faith refines,
Through the shadows, Your light aligns.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I will wait for the morning, the promise unseen,
Like watchmen in darkness, for the day to redeem.
With steadfast hope, my soul will rise,
Your love unfailing, my endless skies.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Out of the depths, I call to You,
Morning will break, Your mercies renew.

epigraph: My soul waiteth for the Lord more than they that watch for the morning
styleNote: Soft Acoustic Guitar · Acoustic Guitar Intensifies · Layered Harmony Crescendos
